description_long: This is a rectangular, two-drawer storage unit made of light-colored wood with a smooth, natural grain pattern. The front face features two horizontal drawers, each equipped with a single, angular metallic handle in the center. The sides and top are plain, uninterrupted wood panels, giving the object a clean and minimalist appearance. The handles are slightly recessed, making them easy to grip and pull. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for storing small to medium-sized items. This piece would commonly be found in urban environments such as offices, garages, or residential entryways.
description: A light wood, two-drawer storage unit with metallic handles and a smooth, minimalist finish. The drawers are front-facing and designed for easy access.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with metallic handles, highlighting the main interactive features.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, uninterrupted wood panel with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid wood panel, identical in finish to the sides, with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, also a plain wood panel with no handles or drawers visible.
